response.justification: The candidate substantially exceeds the 6+ years requirement with nearly two decades of software development experience, including recent full-stack work in the core TypeScript/Node.js/React stack, hands-on AI-agent and MCP tooling development, cloud (AWS CDK) and container (Docker/Kubernetes) experience, and a demonstrated software-craftsmanship culture (TDD, CI/CD, testing libraries, workshops). Gaps are mostly around specific named tools — Nest.js, Kotlin, Vitest/Playwright, and Python are not evidenced — but the breadth and depth of adjacent experience suggests these are quickly learnable.
strengths: Strong recent full-stack TypeScript/Node.js/React experience plus AI-agent and MCP infrastructure work, directly matching the role's stack and AI requirement
Deep testing and quality culture: TDD, trunk-based development, authored test frameworks, and taught testing/Selenium courses
Broad polyglot and systems experience (Java, C/C++, DLang, high-throughput microservices) supporting architecture and performance responsibilities
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience listed despite it being a primary stack technology
Kotlin and Python are absent from the skills list; Java experience appears dated
Named testing tools (Vitest, Jest, Playwright) not evidenced, though equivalent testing expertise exists in other ecosystems

key_factors.factor: Core stack alignment (TypeScript/Node/React) with AI-agent experience
Extensive seniority and craftsmanship (TDD, CI/CD, testing, mentoring)
Missing named tools: Nest.js, Kotlin, Python, Vitest/Playwright
